de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen

Class ReflectionClassCreator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen.ReflectionClassCreator

  • public class ReflectionClassCreator
extends java.lang.Object
    Creates the RFL.java file, that provides setter and getter methods using the reflection API as well as object creation functions based on the objenesis library.

    • Field Summary

      Creates the RFL.java file, that provides setter and getter methods using the reflection API as well as object creation functions based on the objenesis library.

    • Field Detail

      • NEW_LINE

        public static final java.lang.String NEW_LINE
        Constant for the line break which is used by the operating system.

        Do not use \n!

    • Method Detail

      • createClass

        public java.lang.StringBuffer createClass(boolean staticClass)
        Creates the RFL.java file, that provides setter and getter methods using the reflection API as well as object creation functions based on the objenesis library.

      • addSort

        public void addSort(Sort s)
        Constructors, setter-, getter-methods will be created for the added sorts.

      • addSort

        public void addSort(java.lang.String s)
        Constructors, setter-, getter-methods will be created for the added sorts.

      • cleanTypeName

        public static java.lang.String cleanTypeName(java.lang.String s)
        Takes a string representing a type e.g. "java.lang.Object[]" and returns a new name without "." and "[]", e.g. "java_lang_Object_ARRAY_". It is used to create correct setter and getter method names. This method is also used in Assignment.toString(boolean rfl) to generate the correct method names.
